data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_ThanksFor:
You're...
Ah, you must be {PLAYER}{KUN}, right?\pThank you for playing with WALLY a
little while ago.\pHe's been frail and sickly ever
since he was a baby.\pWe've sent him to stay with my relatives
in VERDANTURF TOWN for a while.\pThe air is a lot cleaner there
than it is here.\pWhat's that? Where's WALLY?
He's already left, our WALLY.\pI wonder where he could have
gotten by now?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WonderHow: I wonder how our WALLY is doing?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyHasB:
Hi there, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pOur WALLY's become very healthy
since he went to VERDANTURF TOWN.\pWe owe it all to you!\pWhen WALLY left town, you helped
him catch a POKéMON, right?\pI think that made WALLY really
happy.\pActually, not just WALLY.
It made me, his father, happy too.\pHappy that he's got such a great
friend as you.\pThis isn't a bribe or anything, but
I'd really like you to have this.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_SurfGoAll: If your POKéMON can SURF, you'll be\nable to go to all sorts of places.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyIsCo: WALLY's coming home soon.\nI'm looking forward to that.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_YouMetWal: Oh? You met WALLY in EVER GRANDE\nCITY?\pOh, {PLAYER}{KUN}, don't be silly.\pHe may have gotten healthy, but he\ncan't go somewhere far away like\lthat all by himself.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyWasR: WALLY was really happy when he told\nus that he caught a POKéMON.\pIt's been ages since I've seen him\nsmile like that.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_HusbandHa: Oh, hello, {PLAYER}! We've got\nsomething we want you to have.\pMy husband has it, so please have a\nword with him, dear.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_WallysHouse/text.PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyLeft:
I want you to keep this a secret
from my husband...\pBut our WALLY left VERDANTURF TOWN
without telling anyone.\pYou know, WALLY is frail, but
he's surprisingly strong-willed.\pI'm sure that he'll come back safe
and sound one day!
